ddls:
CREATE TABLE "game_platforms" (
  "game_platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the game-platform mapping */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_awards" (
  "game_award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the game-award mapping */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "award_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_tags" (
  "game_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the game-tag mapping */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_tags_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for the game-platform mapping
Unique identifier for the game-award mapping
Unique identifier for the game-tag mapping
